title: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Super Soft Plush Bear with Rattle in Tummy and Striped Cotton Bow (Small, Pink)
features: Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Pink Small bear rattle
Supersoft plush bear wearing a striped cotton bow
description: Product Description Beautiful Supersoft plush small Hug-a-Boo bear with Rattle from Suki Gifts Baby collection. High quality pink soft plush Hug-a-Boo bear with rattle in tummy and wearing a complimentary striped cotton bow. Approximately 7 inches / 17.8cm tall. Hand wash and air dry. Also available in Blue. Other sizes and options available in the Hug-a-Boo Bear collection. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Directions Hand wash and air dry Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children Box Contains 1 x Suki Baby Hug-a-Boo Pink Small bear rattle See more
